Bot.welcome_text: I will send you a personal horoscope every morning.

aries.love: The stars favor romance today. Mars in your sign adds passion.
aries.money: A good day for financial negotiations. Your confidence will help convince partners.
aries.mood: Energy is overflowing — channel it into creativity or sports.
aries.advice: Take the first step in an important matter — now is the ideal moment.

taurus.love: Venus makes you especially attractive. It's time to strengthen relationships.
taurus.money: Stability is your trump card. Avoid risky investments.
taurus.mood: Calmness and confidence are your main allies today.
taurus.advice: Treat yourself to something nice — you deserve it.

gemini.love: Communication is the key to your partner's heart. Your wit conquers all.
gemini.money: A lucky day for short deals and negotiations.
gemini.advice: Write down your ideas — there are golden ones among them.

cancer.love: The Moon enhances intuition in relationships. Trust your feelings.
cancer.money: Time for saving and budget planning.
cancer.mood: Emotional depth is your strength today.
cancer.advice: Spend the evening with close friends or family.

leo.love: Your charisma is at its peak. Time for important confessions.
leo.money: Generosity will return a hundredfold. Don't be afraid to invest in yourself.
leo.mood: Solar energy fills you with optimism.
leo.advice: Allow yourself to be the center of attention — this is your day.

virgo.love: Attention to detail will strengthen your partner's trust.
virgo.money: An analytical approach will bring profit.
virgo.mood: Order around you means order in your soul.
virgo.advice: Set aside 15 minutes for planning — the result will exceed expectations.

libra.love: Harmony in relationships is achieved through compromise.
libra.money: Partnership projects will bring benefits to both sides.
libra.mood: A striving for beauty makes the day special.
libra.advice: Find a balance between work and rest.

scorpio.love: The depth of your feelings attracts — be sincere.
scorpio.money: Intuition will suggest a profitable deal.
scorpio.advice: Let go of what no longer serves you.

sagittarius.love: Optimism is contagious — share it with your partner.
sagittarius.money: Bold ideas will bring unexpected profit.
sagittarius.mood: A thirst for adventure leads to interesting meetings.
sagittarius.advice: Expand your horizons — the world is full of opportunities.

capricorn.love: Reliability is your main virtue in the eyes of a partner.
capricorn.advice: Set one important goal and take a step towards it.

aquarius.mood: Freedom of thought opens new horizons.
aquarius.advice: Don't be afraid to be yourself — it's your superpower.

pisces.love: Romance is in the air. Trust your intuition.
pisces.money: A creative approach to finances will open new sources.
pisces.mood: Dreaminess is not a weakness, but a gift.
pisces.advice: Devote time to creativity — it will fill your soul.

faqs.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.answer: Use the /cancel command in the bot or the button in your profile. Access remains until the end of the period.

faqs.question: When do forecasts arrive?
faqs.answer: At 07:30 your time. Premium users can choose any time.

faqs.question: How does the trial period work?
faqs.answer: 7 days free. Cancel before it ends and you won't be charged anything.

faqs.question: What are the payment methods?
faqs.answer: Visa, Mastercard, Belkart via the secure bePaid gateway.

FAQSection.have_more_questions: Still have questions? Message the bot

testimonials.name: Anna M.
testimonials.text: I started reading forecasts every morning — now it's my little ritual. The advice is really useful and helps set the mood for the day!

testimonials.name: Dmitry K.
testimonials.text: I was skeptical about horoscopes, but these forecasts were a pleasant surprise. No fluff — just specific recommendations.

testimonials.name: Elena V.
testimonials.text: It is very convenient to get the forecast right in Telegram. Daily compatibility with my husband is a separate plus, it helps to understand each other better.

testimonials.name: Maxim T.
testimonials.text: Subscribed to premium — satisfied! Important dates of the month help plan meetings and negotiations. Recommended.

testimonials.name: Olga S.
testimonials.text: Daily affirmations are my favorite feature. They help maintain a positive attitude even on difficult days.
